title: Update footer to modern clean font style

requirements.text: Replace the Pacifico cursive font in the Footer component with a modern, clean font family (such as Inter, Poppins, or Montserrat) while keeping the text 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits' unchanged

quotes: modern and clean please start building

acceptanceCriteria: Footer text remains 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits'
Font is changed from Pacifico to a modern sans-serif font like Inter, Poppins, or Montserrat
Text remains readable and professional looking
Gradient styling and layout are preserved

requirements.text: Remove or update the Pacifico font import from frontend/index.html if it is no longer used elsewhere in the application after the footer font change
acceptanceCriteria: If Pacifico font is only used in footer, remove the Google Fonts import from index.html
If Pacifico is used elsewhere, keep the import but ensure it's not applied to the footer
Page load performance is not negatively impacted by unused font imports

constraints: Do not change the footer text content
Preserve the gradient styling and overall footer layout
Ensure the new font is web-safe or properly imported
nonGoals: Changing footer text or copyright information
Modifying footer size, position, or color scheme
Adding new footer features or links
